title: SOUTH-CENTRAL EARLY LEARNING HUB - 211info
text: DOUGLAS EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT SOUTH-CENTRAL EARLY LEARNING HUB Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Works to develop a coordinated, effective system of early learning services that equips young children with needed skills for success in school and life. Also helps connect parents to local resources and qualifies families for Preschool Promise. 1409 NE Diamond Lake Boulevard Suite 110 Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-4:30pm Email (541) 957-4807 .12.. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 957-4807 Program contact Athena Wikstrom [email protected] Alternate (541) 957-4809 Douglas Family Resource Facilitator Ronda Osborn [email protected] Alternate (541) 440-4774 Klamath Family Resource Facilitator Danielle Walker [email protected] Alternate (541) 957-4807 Early Learning Program Facilitator Athena Wikstrom [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Douglas, Klamath, and Lake Counties Services: Parenting Skills Classes School Readiness Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EDUCATION SERVICES EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - HOME SCHOOLING EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - SPECIAL EDUCATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - TAKE ROOTS PARENTING CONNECTIONS PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - PRESCHOOL PROMISE PUBLIC SAFETY - CARE CONNECTIONS AND EDUCATION REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - EARLY INTERVENTION AND EARLY CHILDHOOD SPECIAL EDUCATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DOUGLAS EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT
